checkpoints.requirement: Product inspected must match what was booked.
fail_if: Product in report does not match booked product
SKU or reference order mismatch with booking

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection must be performed in QIMAone, never IAPP.
fail_if: Evidence suggests inspection was performed in IAPP instead of QIMAone

checkpoints.requirement: Supplier and Factory names must be in English, combined format: Supplier Name (Factory Name). Both fields filled.
fail_if: Chinese characters in supplier or factory name
Only one of supplier or factory name is filled
Format is not combined Supplier (Factory)

pass: Ruby Beauty Corporation Limited (ZHEJIANG YASILI COSMETICS CO., LTD)

checkpoints.requirement: Product name must be the real product name, not SKU or barcode string.
fail_if: Product name is mostly digits or barcode
Product name equals SKU
Booking name looks like barcode while QSP product name exists in Additional Fields

checkpoints.requirement: Cover photo must show Consumer Pack, frontal angle, vertical orientation, full product name readable.
fail_if: Photo shows bare product without packaging
Photo shows outer carton instead of consumer pack
Blurry, angled, or product name not readable

checkpoints.requirement: If no PO on site, field must be N/A with no additional comment.
fail_if: PO field blank
PO field contains comment instead of N/A when PO not found

checkpoints.requirement: If MFG, EXP, and Batch are all N/A on cover, replace with: Refer to the individual batch/date code in the date code check section
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: All three cover date fields show N/A but replacement sentence is absent

checkpoints.requirement: Location must be written entirely in English.
fail_if: Chinese characters in location field

checkpoints.requirement: Unit must not display Other. Use actual unit from booking (typically Boxes or Packs).
fail_if: Unit field shows Other

checkpoints.requirement: Cover/overall result must match findings in report body.
fail_if: Overall result contradicts checklist findings or defects
Result is Pending or Failed but Important Remarks do not explain why

checkpoints.requirement: Overall result must follow DFI Pass/Pending/Fail/Missing logic.
fail_if: PASS assigned but failures, beyond AQL, or inconsistencies exist
PENDING triggers present but result is PASS or FAIL
FAIL triggers present but result is PASS or PENDING
Missing inspection scenario not classified correctly

checkpoints.requirement: Adhesive test fail (printing unreadable) must yield Pending, never Fail.
fail_if: Adhesive test printing unreadable but overall result is FAIL instead of PENDING

checkpoints.requirement: For PASS: finished quantity >= ordered AND packed quantity >= ordered.
fail_if: Produced quantity below ordered but result is PASS
Packed quantity below ordered but result is PASS
Quantity table says 100% packed but products.packedQuantity is lower

checkpoints.requirement: Quantity on site < 100% finished OR < 80% packed should trigger Pending.
fail_if: Below 100% finished or 80% packed but result is PASS

checkpoints.requirement: No GSS, expired GSS, or GSS inconsistent with bulk should trigger Pending.
fail_if: GSS absent or unavailable but result is PASS
GSS expired but result is PASS
GSS inconsistent with bulk product but result is PASS

checkpoints.requirement: Adhesive test failed with unreadable printing should trigger Pending.
fail_if: Adhesive unreadable but result is PASS

checkpoints.requirement: Factory refused drop test, did not provide tools, or test could not be completed → Pending.
fail_if: Factory refusal or missing tools noted but result is PASS

checkpoints.requirement: Measurement below spec or outside tolerance → Fail.
fail_if: Measurement failure evident but result is PASS or PENDING

checkpoints.requirement: Defects beyond AQL acceptance → Fail.
fail_if: Defects exceed AQL limits but result is PASS

checkpoints.requirement: Any onsite test failed except adhesive → Fail.
fail_if: Non-adhesive test failed but result is PASS or PENDING

checkpoints.requirement: Remark required: The inspection result is [Passed/Pending/Failed] due to [reason].
fail_if: Mandatory result statement missing or vague

checkpoints.requirement: Remark required: All defective items and failure findings are presented to the factory.
fail_if: Defects or failures found but factory presentation not mentioned

checkpoints.requirement: For health product weight checks: remark must state tolerance range regardless of pass/fail.
fail_if: Health product measurement done but only Checked OK without tolerance range
Tolerance range not stated in remark

pass: Checked OK, the tolerance range of weight is 950mg – 1050mg.

checkpoints.requirement: For dimension checks with tolerance: remark must state tolerance range.
fail_if: Dimension measurement with tolerance but range not stated in remark

checkpoints.requirement: If adhesive test waived on date code area (Appendix A products): required waiver remark.
fail_if: Date code adhesive waived but remark missing: Adhesive test on the date code waived due to limitation of the can and ink.

checkpoints.requirement: Carton drop test with findings must describe exactly what was observed using required formats.
fail_if: Drop test has findings but remark does not describe outcome

checkpoints.requirement: Defect found outside workmanship stage must be described separately in remarks.
fail_if: Defect found during quantity/dimension check but no separate remark with section name

checkpoints.requirement: Multiple batches: all batch codes found must be mentioned in remarks.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Multiple batches on site but not all batch codes mentioned

checkpoints.requirement: If no calibration record for tools, note explicitly without impacting result.
fail_if: No calibration record but not remarked

checkpoints.requirement: Factory internal calibration accepted must be remarked.
fail_if: Factory internal calibration used but not remarked

checkpoints.requirement: No Chinese characters in remarks (except Chinese date codes recorded exactly as printed elsewhere).
fail_if: Chinese characters in remarks

checkpoints.requirement: Remarks must be specific, not vague.
fail_if: Vague statements like some issues found without specifics

checkpoints.requirement: Result stated in remark must match overall inspection result.
fail_if: Remark says passed but overall is Failed/Pending or vice versa

checkpoints.requirement: Pending or Failed reports must state reason explicitly.
fail_if: Result is Pending or Failed but no reason in remarks

checkpoints.requirement: Sampling levels must match DFI Sampling Plan Excel.
fail_if: Sampling level in report does not match DFI Sampling Plan

checkpoints.requirement: AQL values must match product type: general Not Allowed/1.5/4.0; earplug same; mask percentage-based from plan.
fail_if: AQL CRI/MAJ/MIN values do not match product type rules

checkpoints.requirement: Checked must match sample size; Max acceptance: size 8→0/0/0, 13→0/0/1, 32→0/1/3.
fail_if: Checked number does not match sampling plan
Max acceptance numbers incorrect for sample size

checkpoints.requirement: Individual Pack AQL table present only if product has individual packaging.
fail_if: Individual Pack AQL table present but product has no individual pack
Individual Pack AQL table absent but product has individual pack

checkpoints.requirement: Colors, Labels, Artworks: if no finding, must be OK not auto N/A.
fail_if: N/A in colors/labels/artworks without corresponding finding

checkpoints.requirement: Record date codes exactly as printed: format, separators, casing.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Date code reformatted or does not match printed format

checkpoints.requirement: At least one of MFG Date, EXP Date, or Lot#/Batch# must be present per product.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: All three absent without N/A where applicable
No date code and no batch on any packaging

checkpoints.requirement: Date code format and printing position must match GSS. Values may differ.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: GSS has MFG+Lot but product only Lot# or format/position differs
Format or printing position differs between GSS and product

checkpoints.requirement: Mandatory close-up comparison photo of date code area GSS vs actual product.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Date code GSS vs product comparison photo absent or insufficient photos

checkpoints.requirement: Multiple batches: each separated clearly, recommended one batch per line.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Multiple batches not clearly separated

checkpoints.requirement: Chinese date codes must be recorded in Chinese exactly as printed.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Chinese date code translated or reformatted instead of recorded as printed

checkpoints.requirement: Full barcode for Individual Pack, Consumer Pack, Outer Carton. N/A if no individual pack.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Barcode fields left blank instead of filled or N/A

checkpoints.requirement: Only GSS term allowed. Never Approved Sample, Golden Sample, etc.
fail_if: Alternative terms to GSS used anywhere in report text

checkpoints.requirement: GSS valid only if: on site, real product, DFI QA signed label, within EXP timeframe.
fail_if: GSS not physically on site
GSS is copy/photo not real product
GSS missing DFI QA signed label
GSS expired based on product EXP on GSS

checkpoints.requirement: If GSS absent: pending report with clear remark.
fail_if: GSS absent but result is PASS without pending/remark

checkpoints.requirement: If GSS expired: inform back office, seal 1 good bulk pc, pending with remark.
fail_if: GSS expired but not pending or missing remark

checkpoints.requirement: Compare all faces, date code, composition, volume/quantity, markings, barcodes, manual, inside product.
fail_if: Missing comparison photos for required elements
Product inside not compared
Date code format or position differs between GSS and product

checkpoints.requirement: Re-sealed GSS: polybag, QIMA sticker signed with date and order number, photo mandatory.
fail_if: Re-sealed GSS photo absent
QIMA sticker unsigned or missing date/order number

checkpoints.requirement: Only measure specs claimed on product name, label, or packaging.
fail_if: Specs measured that are not claimed
Claimed specs not measured

checkpoints.requirement: Health products (NIP): measure total net weight and individual serving weight if stated on label.
fail_if: Total net weight not measured for health product
Serving weight on label but not measured

checkpoints.requirement: Sample size 8 or 13 per packaging level from DFI Sampling Plan.
fail_if: Wrong sample size per packaging level

checkpoints.requirement: Volume/quantity/general weight: no tolerance, actual must be >= claim. Health weight and dimension: tolerance required.
fail_if: Pass/Fail contradicts tolerance logic

checkpoints.requirement: Tolerance range must be stated in remark for dimension and health product weight.
fail_if: Tolerance range missing in remark for applicable checks

checkpoints.requirement: All 8 or 13 samples must not show exactly identical values (copy-paste error).
fail_if: All samples show identical weight or dimension values

checkpoints.requirement: Measurement Table Excel must be attached, filename without Chinese characters.
fail_if: Measurement Table Excel not attached
Excel filename contains Chinese characters

checkpoints.requirement: Empty bottle/sachet and filled product weighed separately, not tare method.
fail_if: Empty and filled weights not recorded separately

checkpoints.requirement: If factory/client cannot provide tolerance: pending with remark, upload data anyway.
fail_if: No tolerance available but result PASS without pending/remark

checkpoints.requirement: Same weight/volume must not be duplicated across two tables for same spec.
fail_if: Same spec value duplicated inconsistently across tables

checkpoints.requirement: Carton drop test mandatory for all products except defined fragile/scale exceptions.
fail_if: Drop test missing without valid exception

checkpoints.requirement: Drop test PASS/PENDING/FAIL per ISTA 1A logic and damage description.
fail_if: Drop result does not match described outcome
No remark describing what was observed
Drop test photos missing

checkpoints.requirement: Adhesive test on all printed areas, Consumer and Individual Pack if present. 3M 500/600P/810.
fail_if: Adhesive not performed on all required areas
Photos do not show test on date code area
No 3M tape noted when required

checkpoints.requirement: Adhesive unreadable = Pending not Fail.
fail_if: Adhesive fail classified as overall Fail

checkpoints.requirement: Appendix A products: date code adhesive may be waived with required remark only.
fail_if: Exemption applicable but waiver remark missing

checkpoints.requirement: Rubbing test on all printings, dry and wet cloth, photos required.
fail_if: Rubbing test not performed or photos missing

checkpoints.requirement: Scan all barcodes on Consumer, Individual, Outer Carton. Record full numbers.
md_sections: DFI(H&B) - Date code check & Barcode details
fail_if: Barcode scanning not done or numbers not recorded

checkpoints.requirement: Sensory: all destructive samples fully poured/emptied with photos.
fail_if: Not all sensory samples emptied or photos missing

checkpoints.requirement: Content check: all 8 or 13 samples emptied with all support photos.
fail_if: Not all content samples emptied or photos missing

checkpoints.requirement: Brush products: bristle pull test per supplier rules.
fail_if: Bristle pull missing for brush product

checkpoints.requirement: Function test all capacities per spec/manual.
fail_if: Function test incomplete

checkpoints.requirement: Pantyliner from Carmelton: back adhesive 500-800 mN per GB/T 8939-2018.
fail_if: Back adhesive out of range or missing

checkpoints.requirement: Minimum 2 AQL tables in Workmanship check. Consumer, Individual, Destructive separate.
fail_if: Fewer than 2 AQL tables present

checkpoints.requirement: Only defects from existing QIMAone list. Unlisted → photos, remark, Pending, not in AQL.
fail_if: Unlisted defect recorded in AQL table
Custom defect category created

checkpoints.requirement: Multiple defects on one sample: count most serious in AQL, full remark in defect comment and Important Remarks.
fail_if: Multiple defects without required remark template

checkpoints.requirement: Defect outside workmanship: not in AQL, remark added, Pending, seal consumer pack.
fail_if: Outside-stage defect in AQL table or missing remark/Pending

checkpoints.requirement: Every defect needs photo with QIMA sticker or arrow.
fail_if: Defect recorded without supporting photo
Defect photo without arrow/sticker

checkpoints.requirement: If no defects: No Defects Found in defect pictures section.
fail_if: No defects recorded but No Defects Found text absent

checkpoints.requirement: Required 100% finished and 80% packed. Below → Pending + remark.
fail_if: Below threshold but PASS without remark
Remark claims 100% packed but packedQuantity below ordered

checkpoints.requirement: Multiple batches sampled proportionally by quantity.
fail_if: Multiple batches but proportional sampling not applied or noted

checkpoints.requirement: Destructive samples from separate consumer packs.
fail_if: Destructive samples not from separate consumer packs

checkpoints.requirement: Shipping mark: front and side photos. Inner mark if exists.
fail_if: Shipping mark photos missing

checkpoints.requirement: One carton per style: printed vs actual size and weight recorded.
fail_if: Carton dimension/weight table incomplete
Missing photo per dimension controlled

checkpoints.requirement: Carton dim/weight diff from shipping mark alone does NOT trigger Pending/Fail but should be remarked if significant.
fail_if: Large gap vs printed spec with no remark

checkpoints.requirement: Factory location must match booking with entrance/gate photos.
fail_if: Factory location differs from booking
No factory entrance photos

checkpoints.requirement: Tools calibrated, certificates photographed, valid 1 year.
fail_if: Calibration certificates absent or expired

checkpoints.requirement: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, COC signed by inspector and factory, photos mandatory.
fail_if: Signed QIMA documents photos missing

checkpoints.requirement: Flag if factory cooperation/cleanliness rated Poor.
fail_if: Factory cooperation rated Poor

checkpoints.requirement: All mandatory photo categories from Section 14 must be present.
fail_if: Any mandatory photo category absent

checkpoints.requirement: Adhesive test photos must show date code area.
fail_if: Adhesive photos do not show date code area

checkpoints.requirement: GSS comparison: all four faces Consumer and Individual Pack if present.
fail_if: Comparison photos missing faces for Consumer or Individual Pack

checkpoints.requirement: Measurements: photo per sample (8 or 13), empty bottle + each filled weight.
fail_if: Insufficient measurement photos for sample size

checkpoints.requirement: Drop test: before, during, after exterior, after interior.
fail_if: Drop test photo set incomplete

checkpoints.requirement: All report content in English except Chinese date codes recorded as printed.
fail_if: Non-English content outside allowed Chinese date codes

checkpoints.requirement: Check wrong units, copy-paste identical values, bad decimals, N/A for measured specs.
fail_if: Wrong unit e.g. kg instead of g
Unreasonable decimal precision
N/A row for spec that should be measured

checkpoints.requirement: Measurement Table Excel mandatory attachment.
fail_if: Measurement Table Excel not attached

checkpoints.requirement: Seal samples per rules: no GSS, expired GSS, critical defects, >50% same defect.
fail_if: Critical defects mentioned but no sealing noted
No GSS or expired GSS but sealing not mentioned

checkpoints.requirement: Defectives repacked in same carton; all good products fully repacked.
fail_if: Repacking rules not followed or not mentioned when relevant

checkpoints.requirement: Section 17 triggers require back office contact CC KA during inspection.
fail_if: Failed finding or beyond AQL without evidence of escalation
Factory address differs from booking
Factory refused drop test non-fragile
Factory refused special test procedure
No inspection tools provided
Performed in IAPP
Individual pack sampling mismatch
Individual pack on site vs QIMAone mismatch
No date code AND no batch on packaging
GSS not on site / unsigned / expired
Factory refused to open GSS
No 3M tape for adhesive test
